title: Avoid using persistent entities as arguments in @RequestMapping methods
description: Using persistent entities as arguments in @RequestMapping methods can lead to unauthorized modifications of the entity's state, known as a mass assignment attack.
recommendation: Avoid using persistent entities as arguments in @RequestMapping methods.
impact: Allows clients to manipulate the object's properties directly, potentially leading to unauthorized modifications of the entity's state.

checks.message: Avoid using persistent entities as arguments in @RequestMapping methods.
